'''鈭歯g-g-n''' ('''ngagana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:newfashion|newfashion]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:newfashion|newfashion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| ngagana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngaganithi|ngaganithi]] || [[word:ngaganiji|ngaganiji]] || [[word:ngaganishi|ngaganishi]] || [[word:ngagani|ngagani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaganuthuth|ngaganuthuth]] || [[word:ngaganujuj|ngaganujuj]] || [[word:ngaganushush|ngaganushush]] || [[word:ngagan|ngagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaganuthu|ngaganuthu]] || [[word:ngaganuju|ngaganuju]] || [[word:ngaganushu|ngaganushu]] || [[word:ngaganu|ngaganu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngaganufuth|ngaganufuth]] || [[word:ngaganufuj|ngaganufuj]] || [[word:ngaganufush|ngaganufush]] || [[word:ngaganuf|ngaganuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngaganethe|ngaganethe]] || [[word:ngaganeje|ngaganeje]] || [[word:ngaganeshe|ngaganeshe]] || [[word:ngagane|ngagane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaganothoth|ngaganothoth]] || [[word:ngaganojoj|ngaganojoj]] || [[word:ngaganoshosh|ngaganoshosh]] || [[word:ngagan|ngagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaganotho|ngaganotho]] || [[word:ngaganojo|ngaganojo]] || [[word:ngaganosho|ngaganosho]] || [[word:ngagano|ngagano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngaganofoth|ngaganofoth]] || [[word:ngaganofoj|ngaganofoj]] || [[word:ngaganofosh|ngaganofosh]] || [[word:ngaganof|ngaganof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngagan忙th忙|ngagan忙th忙]] || [[word:ngagan忙j忙|ngagan忙j忙]] || [[word:ngagan忙sh忙|ngagan忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngagan忙|ngagan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaganathath|ngaganathath]] || [[word:ngaganajaj|ngaganajaj]] || [[word:ngaganashash|ngaganashash]] || [[word:ngagan|ngagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaganatha|ngaganatha]] || [[word:ngaganaja|ngaganaja]] || [[word:ngaganasha|ngaganasha]] || [[word:ngagana|ngagana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngaganafath|ngaganafath]] || [[word:ngaganafaj|ngaganafaj]] || [[word:ngaganafash|ngaganafash]] || [[word:ngaganaf|ngaganaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngaganasha|ngaganasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongaganasha|gongaganasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingaganasha|gokingaganasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngagan眉sha|ngagan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongagankn眉sha|gongagankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingagan眉sha|gokingagan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngagansh毛sha|ngagansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongaganksh毛sha|gongaganksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingagansh毛sha|gokingagansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngaganrosha|ngaganrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagankrosha|gongagankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingaganrosha|gokingaganrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaganmusha|ngaganmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagankmusha|gongagankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaganmusha|gokingaganmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngagansherasha|ngagansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongaganksherasha|gongaganksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingagansherasha|gokingagansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngagangasha|ngagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongagankngasha|gongagankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingagangasha|gokingagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngaganyasha|ngaganyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongagankyasha|gongagankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingaganyasha|gokingaganyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngaganyamasha|ngaganyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongagankyamasha|gongagankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingaganyamasha|gokingaganyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngagan眉sh毛sha|ngagan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongagankn眉sh毛sha|gongagankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingagan眉sh毛sha|gokingagan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngagan眉rosha|ngagan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagankn眉rosha|gongagankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingagan眉rosha|gokingagan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagan眉musha|ngagan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagankn眉musha|gongagankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagan眉musha|gokingagan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngagansh毛n眉sha|ngagansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongaganksh毛n眉sha|gongaganksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingagansh毛n眉sha|gokingagansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngagansh毛rosha|ngagansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongaganksh毛rosha|gongaganksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingagansh毛rosha|gokingagansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagansh毛musha|ngagansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongaganksh毛musha|gongaganksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagansh毛musha|gokingagansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngaganron眉sha|ngaganron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongagankron眉sha|gongagankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingaganron眉sha|gokingaganron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngaganrosh毛sha|ngaganrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongagankrosh毛sha|gongagankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingaganrosh毛sha|gokingaganrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaganromusha|ngaganromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagankromusha|gongagankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaganromusha|gokingaganromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngaganmun眉sha|ngaganmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongagankmun眉sha|gongagankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingaganmun眉sha|gokingaganmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngaganmush毛sha|ngaganmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongagankmush毛sha|gongagankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingaganmush毛sha|gokingaganmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngaganmurosha|ngaganmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagankmurosha|gongagankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingaganmurosha|gokingaganmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngagan|ngagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙g忙n|ng忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongagan|hongagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙g忙n|hong忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongagan|hohongagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙g忙n|hohong忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngagan|n眉ngagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙g忙n|n眉ng忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngagan|n眉n眉ngagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙g忙n|n眉n眉ng忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngagan|n茂ngagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙g忙n|n茂ng忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngagan|n茂n茂ngagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙g忙n|n茂n茂ng忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungagan|lungagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙g忙n|lung忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungagan|lulungagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙g忙n|lulung忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingagan|lingagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙g忙n|ling忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingagan|lilingagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙g忙n|liling忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongagan|kongagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙g忙n|kong忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongagan|kokongagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙g忙n|kokong忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengagan|kengagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙g忙n|keng忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengagan|kekengagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙g忙n|kekeng忙g忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
